items.title: Ether, solana, xrp surge up to 10% as majors recover Saturday's war-driven losses
items.whyYouShouldCare: The recent recovery in major cryptocurrencies signals potential resilience in the market, which could enhance liquidity and trading activity for Solana.

items.title: Morgan Stanley applies for OCC bank charter to custody crypto
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's move to custody crypto indicates institutional interest, which may bolster confidence and liquidity in the broader ecosystem, including Solana.

items.title: Bitcoin falls with Ethereum and Solana as Mutuum Finance lending protocol advances
items.whyYouShouldCare: The decline in major cryptocurrencies amidst protocol advancements highlights the need for Solana to maintain competitive utility and user engagement.
